AddressInfo.Title: AC at Riboville Boutique Hotel & Restaurant
AddressInfo.AccessComments:
Hours:
Mon - Sun: 06:30 - 11:00
Mon - Sun: 12:00 - 16:00
Mon - Sun: 18:00 - 22:00

Charging Hours: Only within trading hours

GeneralComments:
Riboville Boutique Hotel & Restaurant is a 5-star retreat in the Waterfall Equestrian Estate, offering 16 luxury suites with sweeping views of the polo fields and tranquil dams. The restaurant features a large menu of fine food and wines, with the option to dine under the trees or in the elegant gazebo. 
Open daily: Breakfast: 06h30–11h00 (weekends until 12h00), Lunch: 12h00–16h00, Dinner: 18h00–22h00.
It promises a world-class culinary experience. Guests can also enjoy the hotel’s beautiful collection of art, alongside its spa, pool, walking trails, and conference facilities, making Riboville the perfect blend of elegance, nature, and lifestyle.
